title: draconia campestris subsp. borealis
intro: Draconia campestris subsp. borealis, also known as the 'Northern Dragon Root', is a plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce joint pain and inflammation. The roots of the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural medicine.
